creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Same here.

Thunderbird also crashes on startup.

Falkon works fine.

I tried "mv .mozilla mozilla.save" before starting firefox, in case it's an issue with old config files, but it made no difference.

This happens on my ThinkCenter M92P-Tiny, my ThinkPad T430, and in a VirtualBox guest, all running 13.0-RELEASE.
